output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?medal WHERE {
  ?championship rdfs:label "2014 European Team Championships Super League" @en .
  ?event wdt:P1175 ?championship ; rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?eventLabel) , "en") && CONTAINS(STR(?eventLabel) , "Men's 3000m steeplechase"))
  ?result wdt:P1175 ?event ; wdt:P2253 "8:37.51" ; wdt:P1537 ?medal .
}
